name: studio.list_form_submissions
description: Fetch submissions for a specific form on an Actium Studio site. Supports date-range filter + pagination.
whenToUse: Lead-review flow: pull the last 7 days of form submissions for an operator to triage.
Export: batch submissions to CSV or to a downstream CRM as part of a scheduled sync.
Incident diagnosis: 'are we receiving form submissions' — quick read to confirm the pipeline is healthy.
whenNotToUse: Caller has no form_id — resolve via studio.list_forms first.
Caller wants the form schema — use studio.get_form; this returns submission rows, not definitions.
Submissions contain PII — ensure the caller's downstream handling complies with the operator's data policy before invoking.
